div1.entryFree: Checker, to variegate in the manner of a chess-board: a purple flower sprung up, --ed with white, Ven. 1168. the snake . . . with shining --ed slough, H6B III, 1, 229. the green leaves . . . make a --ed shadow on the ground, Tit. II, 3, 15. --ing the eastern clouds with streaks of light, Rom. II, 3, 2.
